summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QSO radio amateur application with callsign grouping functionality. Backend APIs working well, frontend mostly functional with minor modal interaction issues.

minor_bugs.issue: Endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed - missing individual QSO retrieval
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot retrieve individual QSO details, but not critical for app functionality

working_endpoints: Search functionality in grouped QSOs working

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events, blocking interactions with elements behind it
Callsign input field is read-only when adding to existing callsign, should be editable for new callsigns
Escape key doesn't close modal, only clicking outside works

working_features: Header displays 'Connecté en tant que F0ADMIN'
Grouped callsign list (one row per callsign)
Add callsign button for non-existent callsigns

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (grouped, history, stats, create, update, delete)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay z-index issues preventing proper interaction with floating add button and other elements. Consider making callsign input editable when appropriate and add Escape key handler for modal closing.

success_percentage.backend: 95% (37/42 tests passed - missing individual QSO endpoint not critical)
